# Leading Business Valuation Services
Eton provides audit-defensible business valuations across the entire business lifecycle. From business sales to 409A valuations, we help business owners, law firms, and financial institutions navigate complex valuation requirements with confidence.
**✓ 409A Valuations ✓ Transaction Opinions ✓ M &A Valuations**

## Why Eton?
####  We're Focused 
Business valuations are subjective and complex. To be robust and audit defensible, you need experienced experts in your corner. At Eton, we do nothing but valuations—it's our speciality.
####  We’re Human 
Should things turn contentious, our valuations are justifiable in court. We use expert human judgment and robust methodologies that no automated valuation could deliver.
####  We’re Trusted 
We've done thousands of business valuations for leading startups, VC firms, legal teams, accountants and high-net worth individuals. Our customer-centric approach to business keeps them coming back.
### End-to-end business appraisal services
## Our Valuation Services
Our valuation and advisory services are built around your specific needs. Each valuation results in a thorough report that provides a detailed overview of your business, drivers of value, valuation and our justification for it. 
We use professional judgment and advanced analytical techniques to deliver a robust, defensible valuation. Should it be challenged, we’ll provide additional support and defend our valuation.

## Our Leadership
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Chris Walton, JD
#### President & CEO
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cswalton/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/cwalton/)
**Chris Walton, JD** , is President and CEO and co-founded Eton Venture Services in 2010 to provide mission-critical valuations to private companies. He leads a team that collaborates closely with each client’s leadership, board of directors, internal / external counsel, and independent auditors to develop detailed financial models and create accurate, audit-ready valuations.
Chris has led thousands of valuations, including for equity securities, intangible assets, contingent considerations, financial instruments, investment valuations, convertible debt, business valuations for tax compliance purposes and financial reporting compliance requirements, as well as fairness and solvency opinions.
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Colton Owens, CFA
#### Director of valuation
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/coltonrowens/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/cowens/)
**Colton Owens, CFA,** serves as Director of Valuation at Eton Venture Services and is responsible for managing client relationships, new business development, and delivering tailored audit-defensible valuation solutions to companies.
He specializes in valuations for a wide range of sponsor-backed, public and private company clients, from pre-revenue startups to upper middle-market firms, addressing financial reporting, tax, and transaction opinion valuation needs.
![](https://etonvs.com/)
#### Dalton Luong
#### Manager of Valuation
[ Linkedin-in ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/daltonluong/)
[ Learn More ](https://etonvs.com/author/daltonluong/)
**Dalton Luong** is Manager of Valuation at Eton Venture Services, responsible for oversight of a variety of valuation engagements, including business enterprises, intangible assets, and purchase price allocations.
He provides technical guidance and reviews valuation models and reports for compliance with applicable standards. Alongside the leadership team, he identifies and grows new business opportunities for the firm.

## FAQs
##  Why should I choose Eton's rather than a large "big 4" provider?
Eton’s team is filled with ex-big 4 consultants and highly-trained legal professionals. However, we’re a boutique firm meaning we provide superior service quality and more affordable prices than larger firms can.
##  What methodologies will be used?
Determining the most suitable methodology for a valuation depends on the unique circumstances of the company and the specifics of the project. Key considerations include the company’s funding history, historical and projected financial performance, and the anticipated timing of any liquidity event.
Learn more about our approach to methodologies here:
  * [409A process & methodologies](https://etonvs.com/409a-valuation/409a-valuation-process-and-methodologies)
  * [M&A valuation methods & why your narrative matters](https://etonvs.com/ma/m-and-a-valuation-techniques/)


##  Who performs your valuation services?
Our valuations are performed by our in-house team of highly experienced, certified business valuation specialists. Our team of ex-lawyers and big 4 consultants ensure our services are robust, audit-ready and professional.
##  How much do our valuation services cost?
Our standard valuations typically cost between $2000 and $10,000, but complex cases and large transactions can be significantly more expensive. Our [M&A valuation support](https://etonvs.com/services/ma-valuation-support/) pricing varies significantly, please reach out to us for details.

Who We Are
# Top Business Advisors Serving Charlotte, NC & the Southeast
Guiding business owners in making great decisions that lead to successful outcomes is more than just our passion–it’s our purpose. 
[Learn More](https://questnow.net/about-us/)
## What We Do
Quest is a business advisory firm located in the Charlotte metropolitan area, servicing the Southeast region of the United States. We help business owners reach their goals and prepare for transitions. By focusing on the drivers that will increase business value and personal net worth, including supporting the family’s estate and income tax mitigation plans, we help business owners realize liquidity goals in transition. We provide business advisory services to companies throughout the Southeast.
No matter the stage of life your business is in, a proficient business advisor helps you navigate and overcome the challenges and obstacles that are in the way of achieving your goals in business, and in life. 
Quest is your catalyst to facilitate learning, growth, and change to make business transitions and implementations seamlessly align with your business and personal goals. 
We serve privately held business owners and family businesses throughout the United States, including North Carolina, South Carolina, Georgia, Florida, Tennessee & Virginia with revenues typically over $10M+. Industries we serve include but are not limited to Manufacturing, Construction, Distribution and Retail, Professional Services, Technology, Transportation, Industrial Services, and Real Estate. From business valuations & M&A to succession planning & management buyouts, we’re here to help.
Plan for today—and what’s next
## Services By Type
Quest is a business advisory firm that provides a wide range of services, but, we need to ensure our solutions align with your business goals, plans & objectives. If these are not set, we’ll help you set them.
### BUSINESS VALUATION
Understand The Value
We are in business to consistently and routinely value your business for a variety of purposes, but more specifically, to measure the growth in value over time to support the objectives. We think the business valuation metrics should be part of consistent monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes of our client’s businesses. Learn more about our business valuation advisory services.   

[](https://questnow.net/services/business-valuation/)
### MERGERS & ACQUISITIONS
We Handle the Details
Our firm operates as an extended team to the business owner and their financial team as a project CFO to plan for mergers and acquisitions, perform outreach for ideal targets for mergers and acquisitions, negotiate the merger and acquisition options with the targets, confirm financing, organize the ideal business and tax structure, manage diligence and more. Inquire about our M&A services.  

[](https://questnow.net/services/mergers-acquisitions/)
### EXIT PLANNING
Exit on Your Terms
Ideally, we get an owner to exit on their terms with respect to timing, value, transition, and vision. We believe exit planning is an ongoing coordination to maintain the maximum flexibility to achieve the desired “Maximize their Quest” outcome. Learn more about our exit planning advisory services.
[](https://questnow.net/services/exit-planning/)
### SUCCESSION PLANNING
Establishing Successful Transitions
Our succession planning is typically focused on the internal team and the family members involved with the business as well as what possible new roles could be recruited for. Learn more about our succession planning services.
[](https://questnow.net/services/succession-planning/)
[Learn More](https://questnow.net/services/)
Plan for today—and what’s next
## Service By Package
You’re a business owner–but first and foremost, you’re a person. Your business and your lifestyle are inextricably intertwined and Quest understands that. We may be a business advisory firm, but our services align directly with your business and personal goals to help you achieve a fulfilling outcome.
### EXPLORE
The Possibilities
In our Explore package, we meet your business where you are today to plan for tomorrow. Here we’ll put our best thinking and innovative technologies together to assess your strengths and growth opportunities so you can make informed key decisions.
[](https://questnow.net/services/explore/)
### GROW
With Confidence
Our Grow package is where we put all the discoveries made during the Explore phase into action. We’ll help you grow smartly over time to prepare for your eventual transition, all while keeping your personal and business goals at the forefront.
[](https://questnow.net/services/grow/)
### CHANGE
Your Future
When you’re ready for the next phase of life, embrace the transition with our Change package. Now that the enterprise development plans are complete and the environment is favorable, we’ll coordinate a seamless exit while preserving the future of the company and the legacy you’ve built.
[](https://questnow.net/services/change/)
### LEGACY
Protecting What's Next
Our Legacy package protects all that you have built and ensures you move confidently and excitedly into the next phase of life, while preserving the future of the company and the financial security of your family. Achieve financial and lifestyle goals while securing your legacy.
[](https://questnow.net/services/legacy/)
[Learn More](https://questnow.net/services/)
You know where you want to go, we can help you get there
## About Quest
Your business is your biggest asset. Your retirement plan. Your life. **_Your legacy._**
You’ve invested countless time, energy, and resources into building a thriving company and you know where you want it to go, but you’re not quite sure the right steps to get there.
With Quest guiding your steps using our considerable expertise and innovative technologies, you’ll get insights into the health of your business and uncover opportunities for growth so you can move forward with certainty. 
It’s like having a birds-eye view of the drivers that will increase your business value and personal net worth and help you realize liquidity goals in transition. 
## Quest Partners
At Quest, we value collaboration for mutual success. Through strategic partnerships with like-minded organizations, we leverage shared principles and objectives to deliver innovative solutions and exceptional value to our customers.
![](https://questnow.net/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/Untitled-design-8.png)

Choose Capchase as your financing partner to close deals faster and increase your earnings. Approve your buyer, configure your offer, and win your deal in minutes.

## Frequently Asked Questions
Something else? [Chat with our friendly team](https://charisol.io/get-started/)
Do I need to pay when I book a call with your team?
No, you don’t need to pay. The team is happy to listen to your needs.
Can I request a custom service?
Yes, you can. However, we will need details of the custom-made service you require. 
What type of digital products do you build?
We build all types of digital products. 
How do I keep track of my project with you?
Our project manager keeps in touch by giving a weekly update, bi-weekly update or monthly update (whichever works for you) on the progress of your project. We also do a weekly, biweekly or monthly Demo to showcase progress.   
  
All these depend on what works best for you
Do you have a flexible payment plan for your services?
Yes, we do. All you need to do is to inform us, and we always work a way around it to suit both parties. 
How do you manage the time difference when working with a client using a different time zone from yours?
The team makes themselves available for different time zones. We also make use of Calendly, so both parties are in sync. 
Do you offer other tech services?
Yes we do. We offer other tech services like Sales Funnel Strategy and Development, Email Marketing (MailDrip), SEO, Design and Web Audits, Marketing Strategy Development and Implementation, Staff Argumentation, Website Performance Report, Project Management and Sales Operations.
